short-tool-free-turn-cost.title: Short replies used a higher-priced option
short-tool-free-turn-cost.whatHappened: One or more replies used no tools, were 120 output tokens or fewer, and have a cheaper same-provider price calculation for the exact recorded tokens.
short-tool-free-turn-cost.whyItMatters: The same recorded token volume has a lower list-price arithmetic result, although task quality is unknown.
short-tool-free-turn-cost.recommendation: Keep short replies minimal. If your setup can route work by price tier, consider its lower-cost option for this narrow kind of reply.
short-tool-free-turn-cost.claimLimit: A short answer can still require difficult reasoning; this never claims another model would complete the task.
